title: rubus podophyllos var. belonostachys
intro: Rubus podophyllos var. belonostachys, also known as Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan raspberry shrub, is a deciduous shrub native to the Himalayan region. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. Its medicinal properties are believed to offer various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating pain, and acting as an antiviral agent. The plant is often used to prepare herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
